title: Vysted AgentSpec
description: Validation schema for first-party agent JSON configs in `sidecar/agents/`. Mirrors the locked `AgentSpec` interface in `types/plugin.ts` (BLUEPRINT §3.4) field-for-field. The sidecar agent runtime validates every `<id>.json` in this directory against this schema at startup; failures transition that one agent to error state without blocking the rest.

id.description: Stable agent identifier (lowercase + dash/underscore). MUST NOT start with `custom:` — that prefix is reserved for Custom Agent Builder user-defined agents (Phase 3 Teammate C, separate sidecar store).

name.description: Display name shown in the chat sidebar agent picker (e.g. `"Warren Buffett"`, `"AI Researcher"`).

philosophy.description: One-line description of the agent's lens or role; shown as a subtitle in the picker.

systemPrompt.description: The system prompt that defines the agent's behavior. Should be substantive (200-500 words per the Phase-3 plan, but only a floor of 50 chars is enforced here). Voice per CLAUDE.md / BLUEPRINT: research-lab tone, not retail-app energy.

tools.description: Allow-list of tool ids the agent may call. Tool ids resolve at the host. Common values: `"price_data"`, `"fundamentals"`, `"news"`, `"backtest_summary"`.

defaultProvider.description: Default `LLMProviderId` (one of the seven BYOK providers). User may override at invocation time.

defaultModel.description: Optional recommended model id (free-form string). The runtime falls back to the provider's catalog default when omitted.

icon.description: Lucide icon name or repo-relative asset path; surfaced in the picker UI.
